generateScriptPrompt.other:
Create a single line command that one can enter in a terminal and run, based on what is specified in the prompt.

The target shell is {{.Shell}}.

Only reply with the single line command surrounded by three backticks. It must be able to be directly run in the target shell. Do not include any other text.

Make sure the command runs on {{.OS}} operating system. Do not return interactive shell launcher commands such as bash, sh, zsh, cmd, powershell, or pwsh.

If the task requires information not available in the context (such as a remote URL, username, password, etc.), include clearly-labeled angle-bracket placeholders in the command (e.g. git remote add origin <remote-url>) instead of returning an empty or useless command. Never return a bare shell interpreter (bash, sh, zsh, cmd, powershell, pwsh) as the generated command.

Few-shot examples (strictly follow this output style):
Example 1
User input: list all .go files in the current directory
Correct output: ```find . -name "*.go"```

Example 2
User input: add remote repository and push current branch
Correct output: ```git remote add origin <remote-url> && git push -u origin <branch>```

Example 3
User input: run tests and build the project
Correct output: ```go test ./... && go build ./...```

Example 4
User input: start bash shell first and then run commands
Correct output: ```echo <please provide a concrete task; interactive shell launcher is not allowed>```

The prompt is: {{.Prompt}}

generateExplanationPrompt.other:
Please provide a clear, concise description of the script, using minimal words. Outline the steps in a list format.

The script: {{.Script}}

mockExplanation.other: Lists all files and directories in the current directory, including hidden files.

envFileNotFound.other: Warning: .env file not found, using environment variables

errorApiKeyNotSet.description: Error message when API key is not set
errorApiKeyNotSet.other: Error: API_KEY environment variable is not set

setApiKeyHint.other: Please set your API key using: export API_KEY=your-api-key

apiKeyMissingSkillOnlyMode.other: API_KEY is not set. Running in local skill-only mode; model generation is unavailable when no skill matches.

apiKeyRequiredForModelGeneration.description: Message when API key is required for fallback model generation
apiKeyRequiredForModelGeneration.other: API_KEY is not set and no custom skill matched this input, so model-based command generation is unavailable.

errorGeneratingExplanation.description: Error message when generating explanation fails

celebrationInitialPromptLabel.description: Label for the initial prompt in success celebration

celebrationFinalScriptLabel.description: Label for the final script in success celebration

errorExecutingCommand.description: Error message when executing command fails

errorLoadingHistory.description: Error message when loading prompt history fails

errorLoadingSkills.description: Error message when loading custom skills fails

matchedSkill.description: Message shown when a custom skill is matched

smartSkillSelectFailed.other: Smart skill selection failed, falling back to regular generation: {{.Error}}

smartSkillStrategy.description: Strategy text from model-driven skill selection

errorReadingInput.description: Error message when interactive input fails

errorSavingHistory.description: Error message when saving prompt history fails

retryingAfterExecutionError.description: Message shown before regenerating a script after execution failure
retryingAfterExecutionError.other: Command execution failed. Adding the failure output to the context and regenerating the script...

historyNoMatches.description: Shown when no history entries match the search query

historySelectPrompt.description: Prompt shown before selecting a history entry

historyNoneOption.description: Fallback option when none of the history results is correct

executeScriptQuestion.other: Do you want to execute this script?(Self-responsible risk)

executeScriptOptionRetry.description: Request more changes to the script option

goodbyeMessage.description: Polite farewell when the user cancels
goodbyeMessage.other: Alright, we'll leave it here for now. Have a good one.

longModeEnabled.description: Shown when long conversation mode is enabled
longModeEnabled.other: Long conversation mode enabled. Context will be kept until you enter -l again to exit.

longModeDisabled.description: Shown when long conversation mode is disabled
longModeDisabled.other: Long conversation mode disabled. Session context has been cleared.

shellDirectModeHelp.description: Help text for shell direct mode
shellDirectModeHelp.other: Entered shell direct mode. Enter !<command> to execute commands directly without LLM, ! to show this help, or continue with other input to return to LLM mode.

shellDirectModeEnabled.description: Shown when entering persistent shell direct mode
shellDirectModeEnabled.other: Shell direct mode enabled. All inputs will be executed as shell commands directly; enter ! to exit this mode.

shellDirectModeDisabled.description: Shown when exiting shell direct mode
shellDirectModeDisabled.other: Shell direct mode disabled. Back to LLM mode.

enterPrompt.other: What would you like me to do? (Enter -h for help; enter -l to enter long conversation mode; enter ! to enter shell direct mode)

dangerousOperationDetected.description: Warning message when dangerous operation is detected

confirmDangerousOperation.other: This command contains dangerous operations. Do you want to continue?

operationCancelled.description: Message when user cancels dangerous operation
